sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27603" key="difrela/teira" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διφρ-ελάτειρα</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,</foreign> pecul. fem. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">διφρηλάτης,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.359</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
